name: I fell off a ladder at work yesterday and my back hurts bad, what do I do right now?
description: Get medical help now, report to supervisor in writing, take photos, and don't talk to insurance alone.

mainEntity.name: I fell off a ladder at work yesterday and my back hurts bad, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get medical help now, report to supervisor in writing, take photos, and don't talk to insurance alone.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Seek immediate medical attention** and report the incident to your supervisor in writing.[3]

Falls from ladders often cause serious injuries like fractures or herniated discs that may not show symptoms right away.[1] Delaying care can weaken your claim by suggesting injuries were aggravated later.[3]

- Document everything: photos of the ladder/scene, witness names.
- Get a doctor's note detailing injuries and work restrictions.
- Avoid giving recorded statements to insurance without advice.

Notify your employer promptly to start workers' comp; in Utah/Idaho, benefits cover medical and lost wages regardless of fault.[intent: immediate_action]
